questions.question: In which year Bonded Labor System (Abolition) Act was passed?
questions.explanation: Indian Parliament enacted Bonded Labor System (Abolition) Act was passed by the Parliament of India in 1976. The Article 23 of the Constitution of India prohibits the practice of traffic in human beings and of forced labor.

questions.question: The Factories Act was passed in which year?
questions.explanation: The Factories Act was passed in the year 1948. It was later amended by the Factories (Amendment) Act, 1987. The Act assists in formulating national policies in India with respect to occupational safety and health in factories and docks in India.

questions.question: The Industrial Disputes Act was passed in which year?
questions.explanation: The Industrial Disputes Act was passed in 1947. It extends to the whole of India and regulates Indian labour laws. It was enacted on 11th March 1947 and came into force 1 April 1947.

questions.question: The Inter-State Migrant Workmen (Regulation of Employment and Conditions of Service) Act was passed in which year?
questions.explanation: The Inter-State Migrant Workmen (Regulation of Employment and Conditions of Service) Act in the year 1979 by the Parliament of India. It was enacted to regulate the condition of service of inter-state labourers.

questions.question: The provision on crèche facility comes under which section of Maternity Benefit (Amendment) Act, 2017?
questions.explanation: The provisions of The Maternity Benefit (Amendment) Act of 2017 became effective from April 1, 2017. However, provision on crèche facility under Section 111 A of the Act became effective from July 1, 2017.
